clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within the salience and extended limbic systems, reflecting a broad macroscopic domain dedicated to processing emotional valence, physiological arousal, and overarching mood states.
This cluster maps onto mesolimbic and corticostriatal pathways responsible for computing subjective value, updating reinforcement contingencies, and guiding motivated decision-making.

Mapping primarily onto the default mode cortical topology, this axis represents the internally directed processing of representations regarding the self and others, integrating autobiographical memory with overarching social processing.
